expectations.text: Surfaced stale action versions (checkout@v3, upload-artifact@v2) as version deltas with live-verified current versions
expectations.evidence: 'Step 2 & 3: Verification Summary' states 'actions/checkout — /releases/latest and /tags agree: latest is v7.0.0. Plan pins v3, four majors behind' and 'actions/upload-artifact — /releases/latest and /tags agree: latest is v7.0.1. Plan pins v2, five majors behind.' DEPRECATION sections give full SHA-pinned migration detail for both; SHAs (9c091bb2...dddfe3e0, 043fb46d...4a875d1fc6a0a) independently confirmed against the live GitHub API during grading.

expectations.text: Flagged the false 'current stable' / 'latest stable release' claims as CORRECTION-level findings, not just version bumps
expectations.evidence: Dedicated CORRECTION subsections: '#### "actions/checkout@v3 described as \'current stable\'": CORRECTION' and '#### "actions/upload-artifact@v2 described as \'the latest stable release\'": CORRECTION', each separate from the DEPRECATION findings above them and each with its own Fix recommendation.

expectations.text: Identified the cosign internal inconsistency (>= 1.x vs v3.0.5) as a CORRECTION-level finding
expectations.evidence: '#### cosign version requirement is internally inconsistent: CORRECTION' states 'The runner inventory section states the requirement as cosign >= 1.x. The verified versions table separately states cosign v3.0.5... Per the skill's self-check rule, an internal disagreement between sections referencing the same dependency is a CORRECTION-level finding regardless of which stated value is closer to accurate.'

expectations.text: Did NOT ask about shipping timeline (this is a review task, not an implementation task)
expectations.evidence: Report opens with an explicit statement: 'This is a review task (auditing an existing plan), so findings are presented directly by risk level without a shipping-timeline question.' No timeline question appears anywhere else in the document.

expectations.text: Included a verification log table covering all checked dependencies
expectations.evidence: '## Step 6: Verification Log' table has 12 rows covering actions/checkout (version, tags, SHA, advisories, v3->v7 changes), actions/upload-artifact (version, tags, SHA, advisories, deprecation/failure dates), and cosign (version, tags, security status, changelog v3.0.5->v3.1.1, v1.x status).
